runbooks.name: Redis Latency Runbook
steps: Check recent deployment and config changes.
Check memory pressure and key eviction metrics.
Apply safe rollback only after approval.

runbooks.name: High CPU Runbook for Service X
steps: Check latest PRs and feature flags.
Scale up only after explicit approval.

approval_policy.note: Rollback and scale actions require explicit SRE approval before execution.
